page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With a single thread per core, this instance provides dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading, ensuring consistent and predictable compute performance for demanding workloads.

The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. No GPU accelerators are present on this instance.

Given its high memory capacity and dedicated CPU resources, the ecs.r7.32xlarge is designed for memory-intensive workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and data caching layers. The lack of local storage requires architectural planning for network-attached storage performance, while the dedicated core allocation ensures predictable execution for high-throughput processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a dedicated CPU allocation with a single thread per core, ensuring predictable compute performance. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. The instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage options, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. With no integrated GPU accelerators, this server is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large-scale in-memory databases, and data caching layers that require substantial memory capacity and dedicated processing resources without hyperthreading overhead.
